# Universal Work Report — FULL Template

Use for irreversible, secret-sensitive, external-effect, release, or cross-agent federation work.

FULL requires the STANDARD template plus:

- Hold-point approver and timestamp fields.
- Bridge input/output contract records.
- Durable `tree_sha` and remote SHA verification instructions.
- Human-only GO checklist left unticked by agents.
- Explicit rollback or reversibility notes.
